trivial_reasons: TRIVIAL[B]: regime_count=1 (<=1) at this eps — no transition to transfer; likely F1 observable insufficiency (span < eps).
note: A single-regime partition has no transition to transfer. This is not an admissible result and not a VOID input error — it signals that at least one observable does not resolve a transition at the chosen eps (F1: span < eps). Lower eps with a sigma_Delta-justified value, or replace the observable.
